name: Convolver
description: Computes audio convolutions of the input signal and an impulse response loaded from the MicroSD card. Often used for realistic reverb effects, but can also be used creatively to mangle and combine sounds. Based on the disting EX algorithm of the same name.
gui_description: Display shows a graphical representation of the impulse sample on the left. On the right, it shows mono/stereo processing mode, maximum impulse time, actual sample file length, and current CPU usage.

specifications.name: Max impulse
specifications.description: Maximum length of the impulse sample

input_ports.name: Left/mono input
input_ports.description: The left or mono audio input bus
